struct ServiceConfig {
    name: String,
    endpoint: String,
    optional: bool,
}

struct UpstreamClient {
    name: String,
    endpoint: String,
    connected: bool,
}

async fn init_service(configs: Vec<ServiceConfig>) -> Vec<UpstreamClient> {
    let mut clients = Vec::new();
    for cfg in configs {
        if cfg.optional {
            // GOOD: skip optional upstreams, connect on first use
            clients.push(UpstreamClient {
                name: cfg.name,
                endpoint: cfg.endpoint,
                connected: false,
            });
        } else {
            let connected = connect_upstream(&cfg.endpoint).await;
            clients.push(UpstreamClient {
                name: cfg.name,
                endpoint: cfg.endpoint,
                connected,
            });
        }
    }
    clients
}

async fn connect_upstream(endpoint: &str) -> bool {
    true
}
